{{Infobox group
| name = Titan Knights
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Titan Knights Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan]] [[Knights]], also known as the [[Knights of the Titan Force]], were a group of galactic defenders tasked with protecting the universe from various monsters. Their most significant achievement was successfully repelling the [[D’Niss Swarm]], an insectoid threat led by a queen capable of consuming stars. While official reports stated the group retired after completing their mission, different timelines suggest they met more tragic ends. During their peak popularity, the [[Knights]] were highly celebrated figures known for their flashy presence and effective media promotion. Each [[Knight]] operates a [[Divine Titan]], which are highly advanced [[Aethertech]] machines that possess their own unique personalities and levels of consciousness. These pilots, such as the [[Red]], [[Blue]], [[Green]], and Yellow [[Knights]], work together in coordinated combat to face massive threats. The role of a [[Knight]] involves high-level responsibilities, including managing ship security and utilizing [[Combat Arts]]. The connection between a pilot and their [[Titan]] is profound, often serving as a vital source of strength during crises. However, these machines can be dangerous; for instance, a [[Titan]] can go on a rampage if its pilot is overwhelmed, particularly if the machine has been influenced by external forces like solar dragon blood.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Knights]] took care of the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Knights]] are a group that people can be fans of.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion]] was the leader of the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Knights]] officially completed their mission by driving off the [[D’Niss Swarm]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Titan Knights]] are potential targets for [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Javik]] and [[Undermaker]] are former [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Formed specifically to combat the [[D’Niss]], the [[Titan]] [[Knights]] are a group of five individuals that includes [[Raion]]. These galactic guardians once enjoyed immense popularity during their heyday, though they have fared worse in this current [[life]] than in the narrator's memories. The group utilizes a training room filled with mechanical enemies to prepare, and [[Varic Vallenar]] was eventually welcomed into their ranks. Following an address by Shyrax, it is anticipated that a new generation of [[Titan]] [[Knights]] will be produced.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Knights]] are a group of five individuals including [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Titan Knights]] serve as guardians of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Varic Vallenar]] is welcomed to the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Knights]] fared worse in this [[life]] than in the narrator's memory.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator did not join the [[Titan Knights]] in a previous [[life]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Knights]] were formed to fight the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Knights]] have a training room consisting of a mechanical collection of enemies.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Knights]] were extremely popular in their heyday.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A new generation of [[Titan Knights]] will be produced.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax addresses the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
